message:
feat(http,openapi): add server metrics and response examples

Add ServerMetrics struct to fastapi-http with atomic counters for
active connections, total accepted/rejected, timeouts, requests,
and bytes in/out. Wire metrics into TcpServer connection handling.

Add example support to OpenAPI schema types: example/examples fields
on MediaType, example field on ObjectSchema and PrimitiveSchema,
and #[schema(example = "...")] derive macro attribute.

Closes bd-3b18, bd-1csj.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
